summary: Mobile UX audit at 390px viewport for LaunchPath pages: /standards/16-deadly-sins, /standards, /standards/hos-packet, /standards/maintenance-packet, /standards/insurance-packet, and homepage.

ui_bugs.issue: Table content in 2nd+ columns is clipped with no visual scroll indicator on mobile. overflowX:auto is set correctly so scrolling works, but no scrollbar/swipe hint is visible to users — they may not know to scroll right.
Sin cards in expanded detail view appear very dark/low contrast in screenshot at ~2000px scroll depth. May be an overlay or dark background with dark text that is hard to read on mobile.

issues: Table is scrollable (overflowX:auto works) but users get no visual cue to swipe horizontally on mobile — second column 'WHAT THE INVESTIGATOR...' text is cut off with no hint it continues

action_items: Consider adding a visual scroll hint (e.g., fading right edge gradient or '← scroll →' label) on the FMCSA Audit Domain table on /standards for mobile users
Verify sin card text contrast in the expanded detail area (cards at ~2000px scroll depth appear very dark)
critical_code_review_comments: Table on /standards correctly uses overflowX:auto but there is no UX affordance for horizontal scrolling on mobile — a common usability issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pages tested at 390px. Key results: (1) Hamburger nav works and opens correctly. (2) No horizontal overflow on any page. (3) Sins grid and glance grid collapse to single column correctly. (4) Copy Link button is 44px height (meets tap target minimum). (5) All packet pages (HOS, maintenance, insurance) load correctly with proper stacking. (6) Homepage hero has no overflow. (7) Table on /standards is scrollable via overflowX:auto but has no visual scroll indicator for mobile.

mobile_test_results.horizontal_overflow: PASS - no overflow on any page
mobile_test_results.table_horizontal_scroll: PASS (functional) - has overflowX:auto, content scrollable but no visual hint
mobile_test_results.packet_pages_load: PASS - all 3 packet pages load cleanly, price and Gumroad button stack correctly
mobile_test_results.homepage_hero: PASS - no overflow, hero renders correctly
